target: D-don't tell me you're okay, Mio!?

(It's not just the fans;
 it seems like many locals have gathered too)

Uwaa…it's a huge crowd!
Even from this distance from the stage!

Everyone's around us.
This must be the first time
this has ever happened in Hitogashima's history?

Tonight, I'll perform my solo songs
and group songs with fireworks as the backdrop!

There's still a bit until the fireworks,
so I'll introduce you to my favorite things about Hitogashima!

Ah, if you feel unwell,
call the staff!
Don't forget to hydrate!

(That's Kaori, the pro.
Even though she's clearly unsettled,
she's hiding it completely)

Hey Shinpei!
Couldn't you get a special seat
with your acquaintance privileges?

Mio, Tokiko,
stay between me and Sou.
We'll be the wall.

Since it's a yukata today,
I need to be extra careful.

Since it's Mio's first time in a yukata,
I don't want her to be disturbed…
Is that what you mean?

Well… that's how it is.
Even though she said it was her first time,
I don't want it to become a bad memory.

That's the history of this Hitogashima Summer Festival.
Let me ask people not from the area first.
Who's seen the mikoshi~~!
Haha, it seems like the locals are responding too.

Y-yes… I can see,
but it's only through the gaps in the crowd.
Most of the audience is taller than Mio and Tokiko.

Yes, I've connected to the live stream channel.
If you can't see, just look at your phone.

Whoa… look at this!
The number of viewers is huge!

Camera flashes…
Is it all like that?
This is really bad.

Some people are taking photos and videos.
Some are live-streaming on their own channels.

It's true…
It's probably fans, but
it's surprising how many are watching.

It really feels like a top-tier idol.
I can't believe she's from this island.

Do you not remember much
about when Kaori was on the island?

Ah, I think we had some contact,
but I don't really remember much.

Well, she was quiet back then.
It's amazing she succeeded as an idol
and is holding a concert in her hometown.

Honestly, I was wondering
if I should enjoy the festival today
after my sister passed away.

It hasn't been that long since she died,
so I felt guilty.

But when I think about how Kaori worked hard
for the island…

If my sister were alive,
she'd probably yell,
"Go already! What are you waiting for!?"

Ah!
If Ushio were here, she'd definitely join in
and make a big scene!
Maybe she's watching from somewhere right now?

Yeah, I feel that!
Since it's my sister,
she's probably having a great time.

It's time!
Let's start the first song!

Whoa!?
Did she just smile at me?

She was smiling, but
it's probably not directed at you.
You're just overthinking.

(If this festival ends safely,
it'll be a success for the town.)

Kaori's gaze…
It seems to be directed toward the back of the shrine.
Run! Everyone, run away from here!

W-what's happening!?
I can't see well from here!

(The people behind are falling over…
 On the other side…)

Hoo~ra, if you don't run away quickly,
it'll get really bad.

(What is this!?
A four-armed monster…a shadow!?)

E-eh…is that
part of the live performance?

This is an amazing performance!
I need to show it to fans worldwide!

This is bad…
They're mistaking that four-armed shadow for a performance!

(Is the shadow avoiding people?
Was I wrong about that?)

Sou! This is dangerous!
Take Mio and Tokiko and run!
Wait, Shinpei, aren't you coming too!?

I'm going to save Kaori!
You two run to the main street!
I'll meet you there later!

O-oh, okay!
Come on, Mio, Tokiko!

I'll definitely meet up with you later!
Go ahead, Mio!
Move over! I need a close-up for the PV!

Look, everyone!
It's a surprise during Kaori's live!

See? It's awesome, right?
It's like a real event scene!
It's really well done!

Isn't it cool?
You can get closer and watch.

How does it feel?
You're about to die, right?

Everyone finally realized.
It's not a performance,
it's real.

Ah… the panicked people,
making it impossible to move…

That's amazing.
I just intended to increase my mother's meals,
but I didn't expect to see such an interesting scene.

(Did they really say 'meals'?
Could the shadow actually…?)

Hmph… fascinating.
People are truly interesting.

I thought they'd just be running around,
but now more people are pointing cameras at me.

Is this some kind of memorial?
Well, it doesn't matter anyway.

Hmm, something's glowing…
The person's camera
is still running, I see.

Hah… hahaha! 
What a huge number of comments!
It seems people from overseas are watching too.
Ah, some still think I'm a fake.

Well, whatever you think is fine.
Truth means nothing
before the end anyway.
Then, who wants to be my next victim?

You can broadcast your final moments
to the whole world now!
Come on, let's enjoy this ending together.

(If I can get to Kaori's place…
maybe I can escape…)

(Mio's shadow…
How did it get to the stage so fast?!

Mio-chan, what's wrong?!
Why are you doing that?!

Your job's done.
Thank you for your hard work.

Shin-chan, that was rough.
You just pushed me out of nowhere.

(I have to get Kaori out…
no matter what!)

(But I don't have anything
that could be used as a weapon…)

(That thing!
It jumped all the way here?!

You're doing well.
Like a knight protecting a princess.

What are you doing here?
I think I can handle this alone.

Oh, but people were saying
they wanted to broadcast today's scene
to the world.

Oh right, I remember there was
a live camera here…
Ah, this one, this one.

Ah, it's already stopped.
Only the <color=#GF_TIPS_098>news alert</color> is showing.

I thought Kaori's live stream
would get more viewers…

Well, it doesn't matter.
With this much nourishment,
my mother's power will become even stronger.

This could become the most enjoyable
ending in my plans.

Hahaha, Mio, you're eager.
Let's continue from before.

Princess and knight.
Which one should we do first, Mio?

But can you stop calling us
princess and knight?
It's annoying.

W-why is this happening?
This is too cruel…

Think, think!
How can I get her out of here!

…Kaori, even though it's scary,
be ready to run at any time.

Hey, what are you two planning?
What do you gain by doing this?!

Hey, at least tell me
what the point of this is!

You're just stalling time
while thinking of a way out, right?

If nothing works,
you're planning to sacrifice yourself
to get her out, aren't you?

Why are you protecting
that girl so much?

And who is she?
She seems too familiar.

I guess it's fine.
I'll just erase both of you now.

Please…
Go back to the real Mio!

In this situation,
I'll leave it to Mio.
I'll go back to hunting spectators.

Stop it!
Don't kill anyone else!

I'm in the best mood right now
because you brought so many people.

Mother will be happy too.
Then, I'll be going.

(Just a small jump,
and it's already…!)

I've been wondering
since earlier, but…
did you hear about the shadow
from your sister?

But… if that's all,
it does seem odd.

It feels like you knew
everything from the beginning.

(If they find out about the loop,
it'll be bad…)

(Still, I need to
prolong the conversation as much as possible…)

If I tell you the reason…
will you tell me about you guys?

Why do you want to know about us?
Once you're dead,
it won't matter anyway.

I don't think that's certain.
Hey, Kaori.

Kaori…
Do you have anything
that could be used as a weapon?

This keychain has tear gas
in the cap.

The main body of the cap
is tear gas,
and the cap itself
is a security alarm.

(But to use the spray,
I need to get close to the shadow…)

(Also, I don't know
if tear gas even works on shadows…)
Sure, use it however you want.

(Now I have no choice
but to rely on this!)
What are you two up to?

Huh, it's fine.
I don't care what Shin-chan knows.

(If it's come to this,
anything goes!)

I've known about you all along!
From the moment you copied Mio!

I figured it out just by looking.
Shin-chan, you're lying, aren't you?

You're an idiot, Shin-chan…
I thought throwing that thing would do something?

Shin-chan?
What did you just throw--
It's the kind of thing that'd be her last resort…

What's this?
I don't get it, but is this her last resort?

(No…!?
The tear gas spray I had in my hand…!)

You're too naive, Shin-chan.
If it's a last resort, you have to hide it properly.

(Now while I still can,
I need to catch up to Kaori quickly!)
